Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given three cases C001 C002 C003 We need to analyze the event log and identify activities that appear multiple times in the same case and rename them to reflect their context

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Looking at the log we see the following activities that recur within the same case Verify Documents appears in C001 two times C002 only one time and C003 two times Call Customer appears twice in C002 and once in others Therefore the activities that recur within the same case are Verify Documents in C001 and C003 and Call Customer in C002

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Actually lets check C001 two times C002 only one time C003 two times So Verify Documents appears twice in C001 and C003 but only once in C002

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Lets see C001 only one Call Customer C002 two times C003 one time So Call Customer appears twice in C002 and once in others

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The prompt says the same activity names appear multiple times within a single case so we only need to rename when they appear multiple times in the same case

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: For C001 the first Verify Documents is Agent checks identity documents and later they call because verification is incomplete The second Verify Documents is Agent re checks documents now that ID scan is provided So the first one is the initial verification and the second one is a re verification after the customer provided additional documents

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: For C003 the first Verify Documents is Physical verification of ID The second Verify Documents is Re verify docs after account adjustment Again the first is initial the second is after an adjustment

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: For C002 the first Call Customer is Outbound call to clarify account discrepancy The second Call Customer is Follow up call to confirm adjustments made The first call is to clarify the second is a follow up

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: For Verify Documents first occurrence initial verification we can name it Initial Document Verification second occurrence re verification we can name it Document Re verification

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: For Call Customer in C002 first Call Customer to Clarify Discrepancy second Call Customer for Follow up Confirmation

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The key difference is that its the first time versus a subsequent time and the reason might be different but the activity is the same So Initial and Re verification captures the sequence

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We must not change the activities that are not recurring in the same case For example in C002 Verify Documents only appears once so we leave it as Verify Documents Similarly in C001 and C003 Call Customer only appears once so we leave them as Call Customer

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Justification For C001 and C003 the two Verify Documents activities are renamed to Initial Document Verification and Document Re verification to reflect that the first is the initial check and the second is a re check after some corrective action either additional documents or account adjustment For C002 the two Call Customer activities are renamed to reflect the purpose the first call is to clarify a discrepancy and the second is a follow up to confirm adjustments
